query:
UPDATE sites SET 
  countryId = (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE name = 'Saudi Arabia'),
  regionId = (SELECT id FROM regions WHERE name = 'Central'),
  cityId = (SELECT id FROM cities WHERE name = 'Riyadh'),
  siteTypeId = (SELECT id FROM siteTypes WHERE name = 'Data Centre')
WHERE code IN ('RDC46', 'RDC05', 'RDC301', 'ITCC', 'RDCKAFD', 'RDC102', 'RDC103', 'RDC104');
